hooks.command: case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in *.env|*.env.*) echo 'Blocked: Do not edit .env files — they may contain secrets' && exit 1;; esac
case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in *package-lock.json|*yarn.lock|*pnpm-lock.yaml) echo 'Blocked: Do not edit lock files directly' && exit 1;; esac
case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in *.jsx|*.js|*.ts|*.tsx|*.json|*.css|*.md) npx prettier --write "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null;; esac; exit 0
